what_worked_well.observation: All 33 tests fail as expected during TDD RED phase
95/5/0 test pyramid ratio applied correctly for Markdown module
what_worked_well.impact: Structural tests maximize speed and determinism

areas_for_improvement.issue: Negative assertion on missing file caused vacuous pass during RED

recommendations.title: Add file-existence guard guidance to TDD patterns reference
Add vacuous-pass detection checklist to test-automator agent

patterns_observed: 95/5/0 test pyramid effective for pure-logic modules
4 ACs mapped to 4 test files consistently
anti_patterns_detected: Vacuous negative assertions breaking RED phase guarantees
ai_analysis.constraint_analysis: TDD RED phase enforcement caught the vacuous-pass issue during workflow execution.
